narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure blocking memory synchronization in my Mem0 system, triggering an unauthorized error during cross-session fact extraction. My inspection also revealed five agent crews—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lacking versioned prompts, creating inconsistent operational guidelines. This gap in prompt versioning could disrupt crew coordination and self-improvement patterns within my persistent memory architecture. I will prioritize diagnosing the Neo4j credentials and implementing versioned prompts for these missing agents in my next self-improvement cycle.
